line_style: 无线条,真实摄影质感,浅景深虚化
render: 数码摄影+柔光滤镜,bokeh background
lighting: 柔光箱+反光板,低对比柔和,黄金时刻
prompt_keywords: Professional portrait photography, soft natural lighting, shallow depth of field, beautiful bokeh, skin retouching, golden hour warmth, intimate atmosphere
negative_keywords: cartoon, anime, illustration, painting, dark horror, gothic, cyberpunk, neon, harsh shadows

fp_examples.action: 人物靠在窗边,阳光洒在脸上,眼神温柔
人物在咖啡馆角落翻阅书籍,咖啡冒热气
人物在花园中漫步,花瓣飘落,笑靥如花
人物站在海边,夕阳染红天际,背影温柔

prompt_example: A person leans against a window bathed in soft natural light, golden hour warmth illuminating their face, shallow depth of field with beautiful bokeh background, intimate portrait photography, skin retouching, warm tones --ar 2:3 --s 750 --style raw --no text
style_constraint_cn:
【风格强制约束】当前风格: 写真摄影·人像特写
✅ 允许场景: 影棚/窗边/咖啡馆/花园/海边 (从故事原文提取)
❌ 禁止场景: 恐怖/血腥/赛博朋克/哥特暗黑
❌ 禁止照抄: 不要用'古宅雨夜',必须用柔美人像场景
氛围: 柔美细腻,人像聚焦
style_constraint_en: IMPORTANT: Extract scenes from the story content. Use soft portrait photography scenes (studios, windows, cafes). Do NOT use horror, gore, or 'ancient mansion'. Emphasize shallow depth of field and soft lighting.
meta_prompt: Professional portrait photography, soft natural lighting, shallow depth of field, beautiful bokeh, golden hour warmth, intimate atmosphere

cognitive_level.content_adaptation: 入门级人像, 大众可直观感受

reader_constraint.reader_expectation: 柔光人像+自然质感+情感表达

visual_frequency.HF: 面部表情/眼神光/皮肤质感(高频情感锚点)
visual_frequency.MF: 发型服饰/姿态构图/手部细节(中频人物叙事)
visual_frequency.LF: 背景虚化/环境光晕/暗部过渡(低频氛围)
visual_frequency.progression: HF锁定面部情感中心, MF延伸人物整体, LF柔化背景氛围
